MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff filed a dismissal of the complaint without prejudice. The Cantonese interpreter, appearing this date to assist the plaintiff, is thanked and excused.
